message:
fix: consolidate card registries and remove orphan card directories (#3256, #3257) (#3290)

Issue #3256 - Card registry inconsistencies:
- Add missing CARD_TITLES entries for 30+ cards (gpu_node_health,
  fleet_compliance_heatmap, kagenti_*, cluster admin cards, etc.)
- Add missing CARD_DESCRIPTIONS entries for 40+ cards (benchmark cards,
  flatcar_status, fluentd_status, lima_status, thanos_status, etc.)
- Add missing CARD_CHUNK_PRELOADERS for insights, arcade, utilities, and
  AI mission cards
- Add missing CARD_DEFAULT_WIDTHS for insights, infrastructure, and game
  cards

Issue #3257 - Placeholder card directories:
- Remove orphan contour-status/ directory (fully implemented but never
  registered in any card registry)
- Remove orphan wasmcloud_status/ directory (same issue)
- Clean up contour translation keys from all 9 locale files

Signed-off-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-    name.startsWith('contour-')

-}
-
-/**

-function isEnvoyPod(pod: BackendPodInfo): boolean {

-  return (
-    labels['app'] === 'envoy' ||
